Roof Measure

Enter the property address, center the imagery, confirm the structure with a drop pin, and trace the roof outline to generate a fast estimate-grade report.

Roof Measure

Start a roof measurement

Use the address field below to launch the live map workspace. The customer confirms the correct structure first, then the roof can be traced and saved.

Customer confirms the correct structure with a drop pin on the map before tracing the roof outline.
